nodes.name: AccessController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller exposing /access endpoints so the current user can fetch effective permissions and dynamic navigation menus.

nodes.name: AccessMeResponseDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO returned by the access /me endpoint, bundling user permissions and navigation tree for the front-end shell.

nodes.name: AccessPermissionDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO describing a single resolved permission with scope and originating profile, sent to the front-end.

nodes.name: NavigationItemDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO representing a single navigation menu item (label, route, icon) gated by permissions.

nodes.name: NavigationSectionDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO grouping navigation items into a labeled section of the application sidebar.

nodes.name: StructuralEventType.java
nodes.summary: Enum classifying structural change events (team, department, employee, project) that trigger access-profile recomputation.

nodes.name: StructuralChangeEvent.java
nodes.summary: Domain event payload published when organisational structure changes, consumed by the access bootstrap migration logic.

nodes.name: AccessResolutionService.java
nodes.summary: Core authorization engine computing a user effective permissions, department scopes, and navigation tree by combining access profiles, manual grants, and team-hierarchy data.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Java streams and CollectionUtils to merge multi-source permission sets; this is the central authorization resolver referenced by the security layer.

nodes.name: ProfileBootstrapMigration.java
nodes.summary: Idempotent migration runner that replays employees, department heads, team chain leads, and project managers into the access-profile assignment tables.

nodes.name: HeadcountFact.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity persisting headcount snapshots per department and date for analytics dashboards.

nodes.name: HeadcountFactRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for HeadcountFact rows with bulk delete and recent-snapshot lookup.

nodes.name: AnalyticsAggregationService.java
nodes.summary: Scheduled aggregation service that rebuilds analytics snapshots (headcount, leave distribution, approval bottlenecks, project absences) from operational tables.

nodes.name: TeamHierarchyResolver.java
nodes.summary: Resolves the chain of approvers above a leave requester by walking the team hierarchy upward through team leads.

nodes.name: EmployeeController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller for employee CRUD, onboarding triggers, activation email resend, and listings, secured by permission checks.

nodes.name: AccountProvisioningRequest.java
nodes.summary: Inbound DTO carrying credentials and profile data to provision a new Keycloak account alongside an HRIS employee.

nodes.name: DepartmentDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO carrying department identity, name, and head metadata between the API and clients.

nodes.name: EmployeeCreateDto.java
nodes.summary: Validated inbound DTO with all fields required to create a new employee including identity, contract, and assignment data.

nodes.name: EmployeeResponseDto.java
nodes.summary: Outbound DTO exposing employee details enriched with department, manager, and account status fields.

nodes.summary: REST controller exposing /access/me and navigation lookup endpoints.
